description: A downloaded media file named with the platform video id is matched to its library record; an unmatched file is reported, not force-fit.
assertions: the file whose name contains the platform_video_id maps to that video_key
a media file matching no record is listed under unmatched_media
nothing is written to the store

description: For a record missing its transcript, local on-device STT fills it and the provenance (computed_by, backend_chain) is recorded.
assertions: the proposal lists transcript under filled
the transcript is never fabricated and stays on the machine

description: The YouTube retention peak carries the transcript line spoken at that timestamp and the steepest-drop cliff line is identified.
assertions: each most_watched segment carries at_seconds and the words spoken there
the cliff segment is labeled and carries its line
the timestamp is elapsed_ratio times duration_s, never invented

description: With no STT backend installed, the completion returns the run_local_stt gap with the per-OS install command, never a fabricated transcript.
assertions: transcript is not listed under filled
a gap with recommended_action run_local_stt and an install command is returned

description: An Instagram record has retention null-flagged while its transcript and topic themes are still delivered.
assertions: retention_available is false for the Instagram record
most_watched_segments is empty and a no_retention gap is surfaced
